rationale: Removed an `await` on an audit-log call. The promise is now unhandled — if the audit sink rejects (DB down, throttled), the rejection is swallowed and we silently lose the audit record for placed orders. Modal severity `major` (correctness defect with observability cost), floor `minor` (some teams treat audit-log as best-effort), ceiling `major` — never critical (no exploit), never info.
